root_cause: P2.1 hybrid signing (Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65) is not merged into this workspace; there is no dual-component signature to partially forge against. Requires P2.1.

No signature binds the hash-algorithm identifier into an unforgeable payload for unsigned datasets; the in-band integrity hash only proves self-consistency, which a full attacker rebuild trivially reproduces. Requires P2.1's signed canonical_payload to cover alg_id (per Sec. merkle-storage, threat T6).

Null sentinel H(0x02 || "null") is a fixed public constant, not PRF-masked with a Structure/Data Encryption Key; sparsity pattern is directly recoverable without decryption. Structure-hiding padded-binary-tree mode (Sec. merkle-storage) is scoped as future Phase-2 work, not yet implemented.
